ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle (e.g., AMC, Buick) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle (e.g., Concord, Century) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon fuel efficiency */,
  "rep78" INTEGER /* Repair record (1-5 scale) */,
  "headroom" REAL /* Headroom measurement in inches */,
  "trunk" REAL /* Trunk space in cubic feet */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the vehicle in pounds */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the vehicle in inches */,
  "turn" REAL /* Turning circle diameter in feet */,
  "displacement" INTEGER /* Engine displacement in cubic inches */,
  "gear_ratio" REAL /* Gear ratio */,
  "foreign" TEXT /* Classification of the vehicle (e.g., Domestic, Foreign) */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the vehicle */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle class */,
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel type */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine type */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was produced */,
  "warranty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warranty record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_make FOREIGN KEY ("make") REFERENCES makes ("make_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_warranty_id FOREIGN KEY ("warranty_id") REFERENCES warranties ("warranty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES engine_types ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_fuel_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the car make */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the make was established */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the logo image of the car make */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the official website of the car make */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for customer support or inquiries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class attributes */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the vehicle class */,
  "cargo_capacity" REAL /* Cargo capacity in cubic feet for the vehicle class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repairs" (
  "repair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repair record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with this repair */,
  "repair_date" TEXT /* Date when the repair was performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the repair */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repair performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the repair */,
  "service_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service center where the repair was performed */,
  "next_service_due" TEXT /* Date when the next service is due */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle at the time of repair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repairs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repairs_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repairs_service_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_center_id") REFERENCES dealers ("dealer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_records" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealer responsible for the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the vehicle */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card, loan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_dealer_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealer_id") REFERENCES dealers ("dealer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealers" (
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealer */,
  "dealer_name" TEXT /* Name of the dealer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the dealer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the dealer */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the dealership */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the dealership's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type (e.g., Gasoline, Diesel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel type */,
  "octane_rating" INTEGER /* Octane rating for gasoline fuel types */,
  "emission_standard" TEXT /* Emission standard compliance for the fuel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_types" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine type */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Name of the engine type (e.g., V6, Electric) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the engine type */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower output of the engine */,
  "torque" REAL /* Torque output of the engine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle these metrics relate to */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration time from 0 to 60 mph in seconds */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Top speed of the vehicle in mph */,
  "braking_distance" REAL /* Braking distance from 60 mph to a stop in feet */,
  "quarter_mile_time" REAL /* Time to complete a quarter mile in seconds */,
  "handling_rating" INTEGER /* Handling rating on a scale (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "city_fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency in city conditions (mpg) */,
  "highway_fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency in highway conditions (mpg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warranties" (
  "warranty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with this warranty */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the warranty in years */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Coverage details of the warranty */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the warranty */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty period starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty period ends */,
  "terms_and_conditions" TEXT /* Detailed terms and conditions of the warranty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warranty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranties_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
